headline: Sentiment down 115% this week, optimism declining
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 50% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 127 quotes and an overwhelming 113 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 89.7 sits in the upper half of the 53-day range, though well below the peak of 157.8.

• Fears recovered notably from yesterday's very low point, while optimism remains deeply negative despite improving from yesterday's bottom.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
